---
title: "A Framework for Model-Structured Neural Networks"
author:
  - "Gastone Pietro Rosati Papini"
  - "Mattia Piccinini"
publication: "Department of Industrial Engineering, University of Trento (2024)"
type: presentation
categories:
  - "Presentations"
  - "Model-Structured Neural Networks"
url_source: 
url_preprint: 
journ: "Department of Industrial Engineering, University of Trento"
venue: "Department of Industrial Engineering, University of Trento"
year: 2024
doi: ""
pdf: presentation.pdf
pub_number: 33
order: -33
image: slide.png
---

## Summary

Presentation by **Gastone Pietro Rosati Papini** and **Mattia Piccinini** at the **Department of Industrial Engineering, University of Trento** (2024). The seminar *A Framework for Model-Structured Neural Networks* motivates MSNNs versus generic MLPs, reviews related approaches, presents the **nnodely** workflow, and outlines use cases for modeling and control of physical systems.

::: {.presentation-preview}
![](slide.png){fig-alt="First slide: A Framework for Model-Structured Neural Networks" width=95%}
:::
